tokens.colors: Are all colors using @brand or @text semantic tokens? No hex codes allowed.
tokens.spacing: Is the layout using 4px/8px increments? Check for hardcoded margins/paddings.
tokens.radius: Modal: 32px | Card: 24px | Button: 16px. Are these consistent?

scoping.modal_shell: Does the popup inherit from ModalTemplate? Is the close button standard?
scoping.cta_placement: Primary: Right (Action Black) | Secondary: Left (Ghost). Is this followed?
scoping.section_count: Are there more than 3 body sections? If so, consider a Sheet or Page.

typography.headings: Is the title weight 900 (Black) with tight tracking?
typography.labels: Are sub-labels uppercase with widest (0.1em) tracking?
typography.hierachy: Is there a clear visual distinction between Primary, Secondary, and Caption text?

accessibility.aria_labels: Do all icons and interactive elements have descriptive aria-labels?
accessibility.keyboard_nav: Is the focus trap active in the modal? Can it be dismissed with Escape?

mobile_first.rendering: Does the UI switch to a bottom-sheet below 640px?
mobile_first.cta_stacking: Are buttons stacked full-width on mobile?
mobile_first.input_handling: Does the footer stay sticky when the virtual keyboard is open?

polish.interactions: Do buttons have a tactile scale-down (0.98) on press?
polish.shadow_depth: Are shadows soft and deep (shadow-2xl style) or sharp/thin?
polish.loading_states: Do items have Skeleton loaders if data is async?
